Forge is treating this as a [react] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<think>
I need to create a full-stack restaurant management application with 24 specific files.
I will plan the creation in batches to ensure efficiency and follow the "multi-file creation" rules.

Plan:
1.  **Batch 1 (Config & Setup):** `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`, `prisma/schema.prisma`, `.env.example`
2.  **Batch 2 (Core Libs & Middleware):** `src/lib/prisma.ts`, `src/lib/auth.ts`, `src/middleware.ts`, `src/app/globals.css`
3.  **Batch 3 (Layout & Landing):** `src/app/layout.tsx`, `src/app/page.tsx`
4.  **Batch 4 (Auth API & Pages):** `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`, `src/app/auth/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/register/page.tsx`
5.  **Batch 5 (Business API):** `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts`, `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`
6.  **Batch 6 (Dashboard & Pages):** `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `src/app/menu/page.tsx`, `src/app/orders/page.tsx`
7.  **Batch 7 (Components):** `src/components/Navbar.tsx`, `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`, `src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx`, `src/components/OrderTable.tsx`

I will start by creating the first batch.
</think>
